title: China Reopening Boosts Sentiment In Industrial Metal Markets
section_path: China Reopening Boosts Sentiment In Industrial Metal Markets
section_path_text: China Reopening Boosts Sentiment In Industrial Metal Markets
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
A weaker USD and optimism over a China reopening supported sentiment across commodity markets. However, falls in gas and coal markets dragged the broader complex into the red. .Copper led the base metals higher as optimism over China's economic outlook grows.
